title: azedarach sempervirens
intro: Azedarach sempervirens, also known as the Chinese Evergreen or Chinese Cedar, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Azedarach sempervirens include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Azedarach sempervirens include tea infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
